name: io.github.layervai/qurl-mcp
title: qURL
description: Mint, resolve, audit, and rotate scope-limited expiring access links (qURLs) for AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the qURL API with qurl:read, qurl:write, and/or qurl:resolve scopes. Obtain from https://layerv.ai.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: qURL API base URL. Defaults to https://api.layerv.ai. Override only for testing against a non-production qURL backend.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_CONNECTOR_URL
environmentVariables.description: Connector base URL used by upload_file_qurl and upload_file_data_qurl to upload PDF/image files before minting a qURL. Required only for file-upload workflows.

environmentVariables.name: QURL_MCP_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a shared qURL MCP config file. Both stdio and HTTP modes can read SMTP, connector, and default API settings from this file.
